ocr.text: In the first 48 hours, the total Pseudomonas isolated was 4 (16%), only Pseudomonas isolated was 4 (16%), total Acinetobacter
isolated was 1 (4%), only Acinetobacter isolated was 1 (4%), total S. aureus isolated was 18 (72%), and only S. aureus isolated
was 18 (72%). During the last of the first week, total Pseudomonas isolated was 49 (55.5%), only Pseudomonas isolated was 33
(34%), total Acinetobacter isolated was 20 (20.6%), only Acinetobacter isolated was 9 (9.2%), total S. aureus isolated was 28
(28.8%), only S. aureus isolated was 15 (15.4%), with Pseudomonas + Acinetobacter + S. aureus at 2 (2%), Pseudomonas +
Acinetobacter at 6 (6.1%), Pseudomonas + S. aureus at 8 (8.2%), and Acinetobacter + S. aureus at 3 (3.1%). In the second
week, total Pseudomonas isolated was 101 (55.1%), only Pseudomonas isolated was 61 (33.3%), total Acinetobacter isolated
was 51 (27.8%), only Acinetobacter isolated was 19 (10.3%), total S. aureus isolated was 31 (16.9%), only S. aureus isolated
was 17 (9.2%), with Pseudomonas + Acinetobacter at 2 (1.1%), Pseudomonas + S. aureus at 28 (15.3%), Acinetobacter + S.
aureus at 10 (5.4%), and Acinetobacter + S. aureus at 2 (1.1%). In the third week, total Pseudomonas isolated was 59 (64.8%),
only Pseudomonas isolated was 37 (40.6%), total Acinetobacter isolated was 17 (18.6%), only Acinetobacter isolated was 2
(2.1%), total S. aureus isolated was 15 (16.4%), only S. aureus isolated was 5 (5.4%), with Pseudomonas + Acinetobacter at 1
(1.1%), Pseudomonas + S. aureus at 13 (14.2%), Acinetobacter + S. aureus at 8 (8.7%), and Acinetobacter + S. aureus at 1
(1.1%). In the fourth week, total Pseudomonas isolated was 49 (58.3%), only Pseudomonas isolated was 26 (30.9%), total
Acinetobacter isolated was 23 (27.3%), only Acinetobacter isolated was 6 (7.1%), total S. aureus isolated was 12 (14.2%), only
S. aureus isolated was 1 (1.2%), with Pseudomonas + Acinetobacter at 2 (2.3%), Pseudomonas + S.

aureus at 15 (17.8%), and Acinetobacter + S. aureus at 9 (10.7%). In Table 2, the frequencies for AS-Sed (n = 18) show
tachypnea/labored respiration at 22.2%, left atrial thrombi at 33.3%, pleuropericardial effusion at 66.7%, hepatic congestion at
16.7%, pulmonary congestion at 66.7%, right ventricular hypertrophy at 72.2%, and ascites at 22.2%.

effusion at 55.6%, hepatic congestion at 11.1%, pulmonary congestion at 66.7%, right ventricular hypertrophy at 61.1%, and
ascites at 5.60%.
